task: Build overview KPI and backlog summary components
acceptance_criteria: Users can read event volume label coverage backlog and failure-state summaries at a glance
notes: Added overview KPI cards, backlog watchlist, top cohorts, and labeling-health summary on top of shared observability filters.

task: Implement event explorer list and detail drill-down
acceptance_criteria: Users can inspect event rows and open event-level detail with reference links
notes: Added event explorer investigation list, event selection state, detail drill-down, and artifact/reference links via the backend observability and artifact APIs.

task: Handle loading empty and degraded-state UX
acceptance_criteria: The page remains understandable when data is missing partial or still resolving
notes: Overview and explorer now expose explicit loading, empty, and degraded panels instead of falling back to blank shells.

task: Add focused tests for overview and explorer workflows
acceptance_criteria: Overview and event-explorer UI behavior is covered under typed contracts
validation_command: cd frontend && npm run test && npm run typecheck && npm run lint
notes: Focused workspace tests now cover overview KPIs, drill-down behavior, loading, empty, and degraded states. Full frontend tests, frontend typecheck, and changed-path eslint passed after tightening duplicate-label selectors.
